initialQueue.question: Why does the Mona Lisa have no eyebrows?
What physical condition did Beethoven have when he composed his Ninth Symphony?
What did ancient Greeks believe different musical modes could do to people?
What did Odin sacrifice to gain wisdom from the Well of Wisdom?
In Japanese New Year food tradition, why do shrimp symbolize longevity?
What saved the Eiffel Tower from being demolished in 1909?
What unusual weather event forced Mary Shelley indoors and helped inspire Frankenstein?
How did Aztecs originally consume chocolate?
Who operated the retractable shade covering of the ancient Roman Colosseum?
What was the subject of one of the first films shown to a paying audience, which reportedly caused viewers to panic?
